examples.title: Alphanumeric code
examples.description: Eight-character alphanumeric invite code with description text.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PinInput } from '@lostgradient/cinder/pin-input';
  let invite = $state('');
</script>

<PinInput
  id="invite-code"
  bind:value={invite}
  length={8}
  mode="alphanumeric"
  label="Invite code"
  description="Type or paste the code from your invitation email."
/>

examples.title: Basic PIN input
examples.description: Six-digit numeric code with auto-advance and SMS autofill.
examples.code:
{#if code.length === 6}

Submitted: {code}

{/if}

examples.title: Masked PIN
examples.description: Four-digit security PIN rendered as masked segments.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PinInput } from '@lostgradient/cinder/pin-input';
  let pin = $state('');
</script>

<PinInput id="masked-pin" bind:value={pin} length={4} masked label="Security PIN" />
